General.Name: In Technical Productions Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Brightstar Technology Group Co., Ltd., an investment holding company, primarily engages in visual display solution, information technology, and hotel and convention planning businesses in Hong Kong, the People's Republic of China, Macau, and internationally. It operates through three segments: Provision of Visual Display Solution Services, Information Technology Consulting Services, and Hotel and Convention Planning Services. The company provides visual display solutions services for concerts and events, such as corporate events, exhibitions, sports and recreational events, and other live performances, as well as rents equipment. It also offers one-stop technical consulting services and solutions for e-commerce business platforms; and engages in the metaverse technology business. In addition, the company provides hotel reservation and convention planning services. Further, it is involved in the provision of stage design and equipment installation services; and import, export, and wholesale of video equipment and parts and related support services. The company was formerly known as In Technical Productions Holdings Limited and changed its name to Brightstar Technology Group Co., Ltd. in July 2023. Brightstar Technology Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Kwun Tong, Hong Kong.
General.Address: 502, Hoi Bun Industrial Building, Kwun Tong, Hong Kong
